_**User**_

In the whole application currently we are using ActivityIndicator (loader) while loading the any screens. Add skeleton effects on all the screens before loading content on the screen.

---

_**Agent (default)**_


Exploring the codebase to find how loading states and ActivityIndicator are used so we can plan skeleton loaders across screens.

Having mapped ActivityIndicator usage: React Native app with no skeleton library. We'll plan shared primitives (using existing `react-native-linear-gradient` + `Animated` for shimmer) and screen-specific layouts. Profile and Watchlist have no loading spinners today.



_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="create_plan">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **create_plan**</summary>


Parameters:

```json
{
  "name": "Screen skeleton loaders",
  "overview": "Introduce reusable skeleton primitives (shimmer via existing LinearGradient + Animated), add theme tokens for skeleton surfaces, then replace every full-screen and inline &#96;ActivityIndicator&#96; loading state with layouts that mirror each screen’s real content. Pagination footers will use a compact skeleton strip instead of spinners for consistency.",
  "plan": "# Skeleton loaders across StreamList\n\n## Current state\n\n&#96;ActivityIndicator&#96; appears only in production code under [&#96;src/&#96;](src/):\n\n| Area | File | When |\n|------|------|------|\n| Home — full blocking | [&#96;src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx) | &#96;trending.loading \u0026\u0026 trending.movies.length === 0&#96; |\n| Home — discover row | Same | &#96;discover.loading \u0026\u0026 discover.movies.length === 0&#96; |\n| Home — scroll footer | [&#96;src/components/home/HomeLoadingFooter.tsx&#96;](src/components/home/HomeLoadingFooter.tsx) | Infinite scroll loading more |\n| Detail | [&#96;src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx) | &#96;useMovieDetail&#96; initial load |\n| Search — results | [&#96;src/screens/SearchScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/SearchScreen.tsx) | Search with no rows yet |\n| Search — trending | Same | &#96;trending.loading \u0026\u0026 trending.movies.length === 0&#96; |\n| Movie list | [&#96;src/screens/MovieListScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/MovieListScreen.tsx) | Initial load + &#96;ListFooterComponent&#96; |\n\n[&#96;src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/ProfileScreen.tsx) is static (“Coming soon”) with no fetch. [&#96;src/screens/WatchlistScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/WatchlistScreen.tsx) uses local store + hooks but has no loading UI today — **no change** unless you later add async loads.\n\n## Approach (no new npm dependencies)\n\nFollow project rules: colors from [&#96;src/theme/colors.ts&#96;](src/theme/colors.ts), spacing/radius from [&#96;src/theme/spacing.ts&#96;](src/theme/spacing.ts), match existing layout math (e.g. [&#96;MovieRow&#96;](src/components/home/MovieRow.tsx) card width: &#96;(windowWidth - spacing.md * 2 - spacing.md) / 2&#96;).\n\n1. **Theme** — Add 1–2 skeleton tokens (e.g. &#96;skeleton_base&#96; / &#96;skeleton_shimmer&#96;) as aliases or slight variants of existing surfaces (&#96;surface_container_high&#96;, &#96;surface_bright&#96;) so shimmer stays on-palette and passes the “no stray hex in components” rule.\n\n2. **Primitives** — New folder e.g. [&#96;src/components/skeleton/&#96;](src/components/skeleton/):\n   - **&#96;SkeletonBox&#96;**: fixed width/height, &#96;borderRadius&#96; from &#96;radius&#96;, background &#96;skeleton_base&#96;, &#96;overflow: 'hidden'&#96;.\n   - **&#96;Shimmer&#96;**: child of &#96;SkeletonBox&#96;: absolutely positioned &#96;LinearGradient&#96; (already in [&#96;package.json&#96;](package.json)) with &#96;Animated&#96; horizontal translation in a &#96;useEffect&#96; loop (&#96;Animated.loop&#96;), clipped by parent. This reuses an existing dependency and avoids adding &#96;react-native-masked-view&#96;.\n   - **&#96;SkeletonPosterCard&#96;**: column matching [&#96;ContentCard&#96;](src/components/common/ContentCard.tsx) proportions (&#96;ASPECT_RATIO = 2/3&#96;): poster rectangle + 1–2 text bars using &#96;SkeletonBox&#96; heights derived from typography spacing, not magic numbers where avoidable.\n\n3. **Composed layouts** (each exported as a small component used only while &#96;loading \u0026\u0026 no data&#96;):\n\n   - **&#96;HomeScreenSkeleton&#96;**: &#96;SafeAreaView&#96; + top padding consistent with [&#96;HOME_HEADER_CONTENT_HEIGHT&#96;](src/components/home/homeLayout.ts) + scroll padding patterns from the real screen; rows: horizontal pill skeletons (chip strip), large hero block (&#96;HERO_WIDTH&#96; / poster aspect), then 2–3 **horizontal** skeleton rows (title bar + &#96;FlatList&#96;-style row of &#96;SkeletonPosterCard&#96; with correct card width). Replaces the centered spinner branch (~lines 118–126) and the discover inline spinner (~188–191) with either the same full skeleton (acceptable brief flash when switching genre) or a narrower **&#96;DiscoverRowSkeleton&#96;** that mirrors &#96;MovieRow&#96; only — prefer the latter for discover so the rest of the page stays stable.\n\n   - **&#96;DetailScreenSkeleton&#96;**: Full-width block &#96;BACKDROP_HEIGHT&#96; (220), optional offset poster rectangle, several &#96;SkeletonBox&#96; lines for title/chips, synopsis lines, horizontal row of circle + line for cast, small row for “similar” — mirrors section order in [&#96;DetailScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx).\n\n   - **&#96;SearchScreenSkeleton&#96;**: Two variants sharing building blocks:\n     - **Results**: 2-column grid using &#96;windowWidth&#96; and the same &#96;cardWidth&#96; formula as search results (&#96;chunkPairs&#96; / &#96;NUM_COLUMNS&#96;), ~6–8 placeholder cells.\n     - **Trending (empty query)**: same grid as the “Trending Now” section when &#96;trending.loading \u0026\u0026 trending.movies.length === 0&#96;.\n\n   - **&#96;MovieListScreenSkeleton&#96;**: Vertical stack of full-width poster cards (match &#96;styles.card&#96;: &#96;width: '100%'&#96;, &#96;maxWidth: 400&#96;, centered) with separators [&#96;spacing.md&#96;](src/theme/spacing.ts), ~4–5 items.\n\n4. **Footers** (replace spinners, keep behavior):\n   - [&#96;HomeLoadingFooter&#96;](src/components/home/HomeLoadingFooter.tsx): horizontal row of 3–4 small &#96;SkeletonPosterCard&#96; (reduced width) or a single full-width thin &#96;SkeletonBox&#96; “pulse bar” — prefer small poster stubs to match “more movies loading.”\n   - [&#96;MovieListScreen&#96;](src/screens/MovieListScreen.tsx) &#96;ListFooterComponent&#96;: same compact pattern as home footer.\n\n5. **Cleanup** — Remove unused &#96;ActivityIndicator&#96; imports where fully replaced. Keep loading booleans and error branches unchanged.\n\n6. **Tests** — No business logic change; optional smoke test that &#96;SkeletonBox&#96; renders without throw (only if quick to align with [&#96;__tests__/&#96;](__tests__/)); otherwise document that tests were not added for pure UI.\n\n7. **Accessibility** — Wrap skeleton trees in a container with &#96;accessibilityElementsHidden&#96; / &#96;importantForAccessibility=\"no-hide-descendants\"&#96; (or platform-appropriate) so VoiceOver does not traverse placeholder blocks.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  subgraph primitives [Primitives]\n    SkeletonBox\n    Shimmer\n    SkeletonPosterCard\n  end\n  subgraph screens [Screen compositions]\n    HomeSkeleton\n    DetailSkeleton\n    SearchSkeleton\n    MovieListSkeleton\n  end\n  primitives --\u003e screens\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Files to add\n\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/SkeletonBox.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/SkeletonBox.tsx) (and optionally &#96;Shimmer.tsx&#96;, &#96;SkeletonPosterCard.tsx&#96;, or a single &#96;index&#96; barrel).\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/HomeScreenSkeleton.tsx), [&#96;DiscoverRowSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/DiscoverRowSkeleton.tsx) (if split).\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/DetailScreenSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/DetailScreenSkeleton.tsx)\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/SearchResultsSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/SearchResultsSkeleton.tsx) / [&#96;TrendingGridSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/TrendingGridSkeleton.tsx) — or one parameterized component.\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/MovieListSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/MovieListSkeleton.tsx)\n- [&#96;src/components/skeleton/HomeLoadingFooterSkeleton.tsx&#96;](src/components/skeleton/HomeLoadingFooterSkeleton.tsx) (or inline in footer component).\n\n## Files to edit\n\n- [&#96;src/theme/colors.ts&#96;](src/theme/colors.ts) — skeleton tokens.\n- [&#96;src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/HomeScreen.tsx), [&#96;DetailScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/DetailScreen.tsx), [&#96;SearchScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/SearchScreen.tsx), [&#96;MovieListScreen.tsx&#96;](src/screens/MovieListScreen.tsx).\n- [&#96;src/components/home/HomeLoadingFooter.tsx&#96;](src/components/home/HomeLoadingFooter.tsx).\n\n## Out of scope (unless you ask)\n\n- Watchlist / Profile: no current loaders.\n- Replacing **in-row** spinners inside other components if any are added later — same primitives apply.\n",
```
